title: filago germanica subsp. lutescens
intro: Filago germanica subsp. lutescens, also known as yellow fleawort, is a subspecies of the perennial plant Filago germanica. It is a flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae, characterized by its small yellow flowers and leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Yellow fleawort can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and its health benefits may include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antifungal activities.
